searchDocs.title: API Documentation​
searchDocs.content: Documentation for the kit's scripts can be found in the API section found in the top bar. These are meant to assist people that are working on custom scripts for the kit.  See the docs on writing repository scripts for more information. Please note that you are not allowed to use custom scripts in towers meant for EToH unless you have the Verified Builder role or are in a collaboration with someone who has the role.

searchDocs.title: What's different compared to Version 5?​
searchDocs.content: If you are experienced with building towers using an old kit, please read through the changelog as it contains important information. A guide on converting towers made using v5.5 to v6 will be written at a later date.

searchDocs.title: Uploading Music​
searchDocs.content: If you are not using publicly available music, you must reupload the songs yourself for them to play. To avoid moderation action on Roblox, it is heavily recommended to upload all audio on an alt account, then give your main account permission to use it.  Songs can be uploaded via the Asset Manager in Studio or via the Creator Dashboard. After uploading your audio, you can find its asset ID by going to its page and copying the number found in the URL (or by clicking the dots to the right of its name and clicking "Copy Asset ID"). After this, find the Sound object inside the music zone you'd like the song to play in and change the SoundId property to the asset ID of the audio.  If the asset is uploaded on an alt, you can share permission with your main account to use the song in your tower. Go to the Permissions tab on the asset's page, click on the Add Collaborators button and type in your main account's username. Note that your main account and your alt account must be friends in order to share asset permissions.

searchDocs.title: Music Folder​
searchDocs.content: The music folder should contain 3 objects:  The BackgroundMusicZones folder, which contains all music zones that play in the towerThe GlobalBackgroundMusic folder, which contains Sounds that are played when the player is not within any music zoneThe Insert script, which loads in the music system from its AssetID, so it is always up-to-date

searchDocs.title: Music Zones​
searchDocs.content: Music zones are models placed inside the BackgroundMusicZones folder, which contain parts and a Music folder. The Music folder contains all songs (Sound objects) which will play when the player is inside of any part in the zone model.  When multiple songs are present, the next is chosen randomly when the current song stops playing. This can be changed by configuring OrderedTracklist, see Music Zone Configuration for more information.  When multiple zones overlap with eachother, the zone with the highest priority will play its music.

searchDocs.title: Music Zone Configuration​
searchDocs.content: All configurations can either be attributes of the zone model or Value objects inside of it.  Name	Type	Default Value	DescriptionPriority	number	1	Determines a zone's priority value (for explanation on priority, see Music Zones). NoFadeIn	boolean	false	Determines whether music fades in or instantly plays when entering a zone and the previous song has stopped playing. NoFadeOut	boolean	false	Determines whether music fades out or instantly stops when exiting a zone. OrderedTracklist	boolean	false	When true, songs will play in order based on their corresponding Sound object's name, instead of playing in random order. ExitZoneBehavior	Stop or Pause	Stop	Pause will resume music from where it left off when a zone is re-entered, Stop will reset it instead. Disabled	boolean	false	Disables a zone entirely (including its priority effects). ButtonActivated	Color3	none	DEPRECATED, use Music Zone Editors to simulate button activated behavior. Allows zones to be activated via the use of the v5.2/5.3 kit's buttons. Invert	boolean	false	DEPRECATED, swaps the zone's button activated state.

searchDocs.title: Sound Configuration​
searchDocs.content: Sounds in the Music folder (and GlobalBackgroundMusic) can also be configured. Just like music zones, all of these can either be attributes of the sound or Value objects inside of it.  Name	Type	Default Value	DescriptionStartAt	number	0	Used as a replacement for the TimePosition property (which does not work due to songs looping when they end). FadeIncrement	number	30	Determines how fast the sound fades in & out. The formula to calculate the exact fade time is: 0.1 * FadeIncrement MusicName	string	-	A custom name that will be displayed instead of the sound asset's name (not to be confused with the sound object's name in studio).  In addition to this, when a sound is named IntroMusic, it will always be the first to play and will never play again unless the zone is re-entered. This can be used for better song loops.

searchDocs.title: Settings Module​
searchDocs.content: Note: This section is meant for those with scripting knowledge looking to work more in-depth with the music system. An optional ModuleScript named Settings can be passed as the 2nd parameter to the function returned by the require call. This module should return a table with the following optional keys.  Key	Type	Default Value	DescriptionUseDefaultMuteButton	boolean	false	Disables the default mute button. Allows for custom mute buttons, a template for which is provided in the music system model. UseSmoothAsDefaultTransition	boolean	true	Determines whether to transition music using the Smooth or Classic style, like the EToH setting.

searchDocs.title: 🔵 Ensure Dyno on Discord can message you as we use it to alert users of deleted submissions.
What to include in your submission​
searchDocs.content: The tower's nameLink to the tower place. Must be a standalone place, do not use places like hubs.The difficulty you think is applicable. The tower must be between Easy and Catastrophic difficulty. Part count of the tower, including the frame and all parts in the Obby folder. Note that all parts (excluding NegativeParts) that comprise an union also count towards the limit.Optionally, include a video or other notes that you think would be helpful.

searchDocs.title: Tower Place​
searchDocs.content: Your place must include the Noclip and Heal tools that are included by default in the kit. We also recommend adding a godmode tool if your tower heavily relies on killbricks, especially instakillsYour place must include the modified PlayerModule script included in the kit.Your tower should be easily enterable when joining the place.Upload your tower's intended music and include the audio in the place using the provided music module. Refer to the music system documentation for help in adding music Music used in your tower must be either copyright-free or be approved for use by its composer. Refer to this spreadsheet for a list of approved artists and this page for a template to aid in asking artists for permission You may include terrain or other decoration in the tower’s place if you wish, but ensure it does not interfere with gameplay and please be aware that the terrain may not be included ingame.The tower's place must be public and accessible to everybody, including no paid access fees or age/country restrictions.

searchDocs.title: Tower Building​
searchDocs.content: Towers must be built in Roblox Studio, using the official kit only. Your tower must be built with the latest available version of the kit, unless it was started before the release of said version. It is recommended to keep your tower up-to-date with the latest kit version in order to reduce the amount of issues when inserted ingame. Your tower can be updated to the latest version using the provided update kits. The tower floor count must be within the range of the tower type being built. Towers are 10 floors, Steeples are 5-6, and Citadels are 12-25. A “floor” is generally defined as a 100x100x100 box with clear boundaries. Floors may be moved or rotated into orientations that differ from the default frame in the kit, and may be expanded up to 75 studs to the side in any direction. There is no limit on how far “outside sections” may extend from the tower’s frame, and enclosed spaces significantly smaller than a floor in at least one dimension (i.e. droppers or small basements) are not considered floors.We still suggest that you aim to make your tower feel like a tower and ensure that floors are clearly distinguishable and taken into consideration in the tower’s progression, as this will increase your chances of approval.Your tower must have a presentable frame that contains at least a portion of the gameplay. Towers without a visible frame or towers that have nothing resembling a frame are not allowed. A "fake / placeholder" frame may be used in place of the actual frame as long as it contains at least a portion of the tower's gameplay. Your tower must not have more than 7500 server-sided (obby + frame) parts. Citadels may use 750 additional parts per extra floor. Do not place static parts in the client object folder to circumvent this requirement; this includes making parts button-activated if there is no direct purpose for gameplay. No free models should be in your tower. For performance reasons, it's recommended to use meshes, textures, unusual materials, etc. sparingly. Custom scripts, or CCO's (Custom Client Objects) cannot be used unless you have the Verified Builder role or are in a collab with someone who has the role. Minor edits are allowed as long as they do not change the core functionality of an object, including making heavy edits to repository scripts in the kit. “Heavy” edits are defined as the addition of new lines or major changes to existing lines in a script; changes to number values, etc. are fine.Script edits that are not blatantly noticeable are usually allowed, for example: edits made to bugfix complex contraptions. If client object contraptions are difficult to explain without script edits, we may inquire to explain what you did and likely request to replace certain sections if there is a problem. Feel free to reach out to curators while building towers to ask if certain edits are acceptable.Do not edit any existing scripts. These changes will not carry over ingame and will cause issues. If you wish to write a custom script or make minor script edits to an existing object, please read the guidelines on them to avoid issues.Custom scripts that affect lighting (without using the built-in LightingManager) are entirely disallowed. No AI Generated content whatsoever.

searchDocs.title: Tower Submission​
searchDocs.content: You may only submit a tower three times in total unless it is given a major revamp. (i.e. the majority of the tower’s gameplay has been replaced)Be cautious with resubmitting passing towers, as a failing verdict will result in your tower being removed from the whitelist.Provide credit to all users who built at least 10% of the tower’s total gameplay, unless they wish to not be credited.Do not submit towers specifically with the intent of becoming a monthly.Steeple submissions are only allowed if at least one of the following is applicable: Steeple submissions for an unreleased area are openThere is an ongoing contest Citadel submissions are only allowed if you meet at least one of the following requirements: You have the Verified Builder role or are in a collab with someone who has the roleYou have at least one tower ingame with 2 or fewer builders credited (including monthly towers) Do not repost submissions. Please be patient as we work on our own time.Do not submit joke/low effort/old towers without the intent of it passing.You may only submit revamps of existing ingame towers if you are the builder of said tower. Revamps not by the original creator are exclusively made/commissioned by staff and are not eligible for submission.The Builder role is only given to creators of whitelisted towers with 3 or less creators credited.By submitting your tower, you agree that you are not allowed to request its removal from the game once confirmed.

searchDocs.title: Naming​
searchDocs.content: Tower names must begin with "[Tower/Citadel/Steeple] of" before the name and must be between 1 and 4 words long ("Tower of ___ ___ ___ ___").The tower name and acronym must not match with another tower in-game (excluding monthly towers) and be appropriate.

searchDocs.title: Useful 3rd-party tools:​
searchDocs.content: Oozle Draw (use this to make tightropes)Portal KitSurface ToolbLocker's Tools (use this to generate frame gradients and randomly color & rotate parts)

searchDocs.title: Kit Settings​
searchDocs.content: There is a KitSettings module found in ReplicatedStorage that allows you to toggle global kit settings. These settings will alter how the kit functions in your place.  Name	Default Value	DescriptionResetOnDeath	true	When true, all client objects will reload when you die and respawn. This mimics how your tower will behave when placed ingame and can be useful for bugtesting. DisplaySettingsGui	true	When true, you will have access to a settings menu that allows you to quickly rejoin the game and change settings such as your corner flip keybind. DisplayDebugGuis	false	When true, the kit will display a debug menu that shows stats about your play session, such as FPS, RAM usage, the amount of instances, etc. DisplayMemoryDebug	false	When true, the kit will display a debug menu that shows a more in-depth overview of the RAM usage in your place and what is using it. Useful for optimization.

searchDocs.title: Object Tags​
searchDocs.content: In Kit v6, value objects are no longer used in favor of Configuration objects for settings, and Tags for object flags. Below is a table of all usable tags.

searchDocs.title: General​
searchDocs.content: Name	DescriptionInvisible, AltInvisible	Makes parts invisible if present. Invisible will use Transparency while AltInvisible will use LocalTransparencyModifier. CanFlip	If present, the player will be able to perform Corner Flips on the part. DoNotFlipPlayer	If present alongside the CanFlip tag, performing a Corner Flip on a Part will not move/rotate the player. Useful for flip-activated client objects. OnlyInStudio	If present, the object will only be present while building in Studio and will automatically be deleted at runtime.

searchDocs.title: Client Object Specific​
searchDocs.content: Name	DescriptionButtonActivated	If present, the client object will become inactive until activated by a Button. SkipObjectLoad	If present inside a client object, it will not be automatically loaded when the tower loads. Required for client objects that have the capability of spawning other client objects, such as Pushboxes or Turrets

searchDocs.title: Collision Groups​
searchDocs.content: The kit has several built in collision groups that can be used to control what collides with what. A list of all collision groups is given below:  Name	Doesn't Collide WithOnlyCollideWithPlayers	OnlyCollideWithPlayers, Default, DoNotCollideWithPlayers, ClientObjects, OnlyCollideWithPlayers2, NeverCollide OnlyCollideWithDefault, DoNotCollideWithSelf OnlyCollideWithPlayers2	Default, DoNotCollideWithPlayers, ClientObjects, NeverCollide, OnlyCollideWithDefault, DoNotCollideWithSelf OnlyCollideWithDefault	NeverCollide, ClientObjects, DoNotCollideWithPlayers, DoNotCollideWithSelf DoNotCollideWithPlayers AlwaysCollide Player	OtherPlayers, DoNotCollideWithPlayers, NeverCollide, OnlyCollideWithDefault OtherPlayers	ClientObjects, DoNotCollideWithPlayers, OnlyCollideWithPlayers, OnlyCollideWithPlayers2, NeverCollide, AlwaysCollide OnlyCollideWithDefault, DoNotCollideWithSelf DoNotCollideWithSelf	DoNotCollideWithSelf NeverCollide	NeverCollide, Default, ClientObjects, DoNotCollideWithPlayers, DoNotCollideWithSelf, AlwaysCollide ClientObjects

searchDocs.title: Music Sync Configuration​
searchDocs.content: Certain client objects have a MusicSyncConfiguration inside their main Configuration object. This can be used to make them music synced. They contain a SyncEnabled attribute and a ZoneName attribute which specifies whether to use music sync, and the music zone to sync to.  It also contains a Sync module where the actual sync is defined, an example of it looks like this:  return { TimingOffset = 000.000, -- Change this to sync your song BeatsPerMinute = { -- Example: { beat = 016.000, bpm = 180.000 }, { beat = 000.000, bpm = 130.000 }, }, Stops = { -- Example stop: { beat = 002.000, seconds = 000.500 }, -- Stops the music at beat 2 for 0.5 seconds }, }   TimingOffset is the timestamp in seconds that defines the start of the song. Use this if your song doesn't directly start as soon as the sound plays.  BeatsPerMinute is a table that defines the BPM for certain timestamps of the song, measured in beats. The BPM set in beat 0 defines the BPM of the start of the song.  Stops is a table that defines pauses in the song. The timestamp of where to stop is measured in beats, and the amount of time to pause for is measured in seconds.

searchDocs.title: Writing/Editing Repository Scripts​
searchDocs.content: NOTE: Keep in mind that custom scripts are not allowed in towers meant for EToH unless you have the Verified Builder role or are in a collaboration with someone who has the role.  When writing custom Client Object repository scripts, PLEASE keep the following things in mind as not following them can and will lead to many issues ingame:  Do not edit existing scripts under any circumstance. These changes will not carry over ingame and will break your tower. New scripts (or edits to existing ones) should be put in the ExternalRepositories.TowerKit folder in ReplicatedStorage. Client objects are linked to their respective script by a Tag in their Configuration object. If your script is located at ExternalRepositories.TowerKit.Interactables.MyNewCO, then the tag will be CO_Interactables/MyNewCO. You can take a look at the base COs in the kit to see how this is set up. The ExternalRepositories folder is to be included in your tower's model upon submission.Make sure to put any events or connections you create into a Scope, so that they will automatically be cleaned up when the tower unloads.Make sure to optimize your code as much as you can in order to reduce potential lag issues.Read the API Documentation carefully as these contain many functions to speed up the process of writing repository scripts.Read the existing scripts to get a general idea of how your code should be written. Try to maintain a similar style to make your tower easier to bugfix should it get ingame.  Repository Script Template --!strict --!optimize 2 --@version template-6.X.X --@creator you local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage") local _T = require(ReplicatedStorage.Framework.ClientTypes) local Module = { -- Determines whether or not the script can be used by client objects CanQueue = true, -- Determines whether or not the script will be loaded upon entering -- (the script will be loaded without an instance attacted to the scope, -- remove the lines that use the "objectConfig" variables if you use this) RunOnStart = false, } -- This function only runs once, and can be used to set up stuff -- (e.g. config templates) function Module.Init(utility: _T.Utility) -- init code here end function Module.Run(scope: _T.Scope, utility: _T.Utility) local objectConfig = scope.instance if not objectConfig or not objectConfig.Parent then return end -- Your client object code goes here end return Module

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Request for permission to use music in a Roblox game.

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Hi (Artist),  I'm reaching out to ask for your thoughts about the usage of your songs within the Roblox game "Eternal Towers of Hell", also known as "EToH". The game consists of an assortment of 3D platformer levels called "towers", the development of which are built by an open community of different builders. Because the game is open-ended, it works similar to a level creator system: anyone is able to build, upload, and share their own tower. Of these towers, a small selection is then chosen by the EToH developers to showcase within custom areas of a privately owned spotlight game.  Towers often use multiple songs from an assortment of different artists, with each "floor" of the tower using a separate song: the way songs are used in the game are similar to that of each tower having its own custom playlist. Your songs will not comprise the entire background audio of the game, but instead play at specific points of a tower for a small duration of time, of which combined with multiple other tracks creates a complete experience. (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  The community that builds these towers needs explicit permission to use your work, so your thoughts would be greatly appreciated!  I am not affiliated with the dev team, but with proof of your permission or denial, the developers will uphold your requests.  You will be credited as the composer, with the name of the track used on display as it plays in game.You also may specify which songs, or albums, are allowed to be used by the game (originals, remix/bootleg, record labels, etc.), as well as request any other terms of use.You can view how artists and their usage terms are listed here: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingYou may revoke permission or update any terms at anytime by contacting their email at (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).  The game is free to play with optional microtransactions to support the developers. Individual towers where your songs will be used do not generate revenue, but Roblox has playtime revenue (robux) which is out of the games' control.  Thank you for taking the time to consider this. If you have any questions, please ask. Please note your response may be public for the record, however if you wish for your response to be kept private, please ask and it will stay between me and the developers of EToH.  I greatly appreciate your time, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: 🇦🇱 Albanian​
searchDocs.content: Translated by toi119, proofread by ProgamerchairXD

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Kërkesë per leje për përdorimin e këngëve në një lojë ne Roblox.

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Përshëndetje (Artist),  Po ju shkruaj me qëllim për mendimin tuaj në lidhje me përdorimin e këngëve tuaja brenda lojës në Roblox të quajtur "Eternal Towers of Hell" apo "EToH" për së shkurti. Kjo lojë përbëhet nga një shumëllojshmëri e niveleve 'platformer' tre-dimensionale të quajtur "kulla", zhvillimi i këtyre kullave bëhet nga një komunitet i hapur i lojtarëve të ndryshëm (ndërtuesit). Sepse loja eshtë me fund të hapur (open-ended), ajo funksionon ngjajshëm me një editor nivelesh: çdokush e ka të mundur të ndërtojë, ngarkojë dhe shpërndajë kullën e tyre. Prej këtyre kullave, vetëm nje numër i vogël i tyre zgjidhen nga zhvilluesit e 'EToH' për t'i shfaqur në zona të personalizuara në një lojë në pronësi private.  Kullat shpesh përdorin mjaft këngë të ndryshme nga një grup artistësh të ndryshëm, me secilin "kat" të kullës duke përdorur një këngë e veçante: mënyra se si këngët përdoren në këte lojë është sikurse secila kullë e ka listën e këngëve të veta (playlist). Këngët tuaja nuk do luajnë në sfondin e gjithë lojës, por vetëm në momente të caktuara te kullës, për një kohë të shkurtër, dhe kur kombinohet me këngë të tjera, atëhere ofron një eksperiencë të plotë. (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  Komuniteti që ndërton këto kulla ka nevojë për leje të qartë te përdorë punën tënde, kështu që mendimet tuaja janë mjaft të vlerësuara!  Unë nuk jam pjesë e ekipit te zhvilluesve, por me provën e miratimit/refuzimit tuaj, atëherë zhvilluesit do zbatojnë dëshirat tuaja.  Ti do të kreditohesh si kompozitori, me emrin e këngës në përdorim në shfaqje përderisa luan në lojë.Ju mund të specifikoni se cilat këngë apo albume mund të përdoren brenda lojës (origjinalet, 'remix'-at/versione të paautorizuara, versione diskografike, etj.), apo mund të kërkosh kushte të tjera të përdorimit.Ti mund të shikosh sesi janë të listuar artistat dhe kushtet e tyre të përdorimit këtu: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingTi mund të anulosh lejen në çdo moment apo të përditësosh kushtet duke kontaktuar zhvilluesit në emailin e tyre tek (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).  Kjo lojë mund të luhet pa pagesë, por me mikrotransaksione opsionale me qëllim mbështetjen e zhvilluesëve. Kullat individuale ku këngët tuaja do përdoren nuk gjenerojnë të ardhura, por Roblox gjeneron të ardhura bazuar në kohën e kaluar në lojë, gjë që është jashtë kontrollit të zhvilluesve.  Faleminderit për kohën që keni ndarë për ta konsideruar këtë kërkesë. Nëse keni ndonjë pyetje, ju lutem që t'i shprehni ato. Mbani mend që përgjigja juaj mund të jetë publike sa për sqarim, por nëse keni dëshirë që përgjigja juaj të jetë private, atëherë na kërkoni dhe do qëndrojë në mes meje dhe zhvilluesve të 'EToH'-së.  E vlerësoj shumë kohën tuaj, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Traditional Chinese​
searchDocs.content: Subject​  請求授權於《機器磚塊(Roblox)》遊戲中使用您的音樂  Body​  您好，我現致函詢問在《機器磚塊(Roblox)》《Eternal Towers of Hell (下簡稱EToH)》中使用您的音樂的看法。EToH 是一款 3D平台/跑酷遊戲，由一系列被稱為「Towers (塔)」的獨立關卡組成。這些塔由一個公開的社群的創作者們共同建造。 由於遊戲採用開放式設計，其運作方式類似於關卡編輯器：任何人都可以建造、上傳及分享自己的塔。從中，EToH 的開發團隊會精選部分塔，於官方遊戲中供展出及遊玩。  塔中往往會使用來自不同藝術家的多首歌曲，每一至三「層」使用一首獨立的歌曲，即每座塔擁有自己的特定播放列表。您的歌曲不會作為遊戲的全程背景音樂，而是在塔的特定節點播放一小段時間，與其他曲目共同組成完整的體驗。(請參考：https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  建造這些塔的社群成員需要取得您的明確授權方可使用您的作品，因此非常期待您的回覆！  本人並非開發團隊的成員，但在取得您授權或拒絕的證明後，開發團隊將會遵從您的意願。  您將被標註為作曲者，曲目名稱會在遊戲中播放時顯示。您亦可指定哪些歌曲或專輯可供遊戲使用（原創作品、混音/非官方混音、唱片公司作品等），以及提出任何其他使用條款。您可在此查看藝術家及其使用條款的列表方式：https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharing (英文)您可隨時透過電郵聯絡開發團隊以撤回授權或更新任何條款：(etohofficialcontact@gmail.com)。  本遊戲為免費遊玩，設有可選的微交易以支持開發者。使用您歌曲的個別塔不會產生收益，但 Roblox 平台設有基於遊玩時間的收益機制（Robux），此部分不在遊戲開發者的控制範圍內。  感謝您撥冗考慮此事。如有任何疑問，敬請提出。另外，您的回覆可能會被公開存檔以作紀錄；如您希望回覆保密，煩請告知，內容將僅限於本人與 EToH 開發團隊之間。  敬頌藝安， (Sender)

searchDocs.content: Subject​  请求授权于《罗布乐思(Roblox)》游戏中使用您的音乐  Body​  请求授权于《罗布乐思(Roblox)》游戏中使用您的音乐  致(Artist)：  您好，我现致函询问在《罗布乐思(Roblox)》《Eternal Towers of Hell (下简称EToH)》中使用您的音乐的看法。EToH 是一款 3D平台/跑酷游戏，由一系列被称为「Towers (塔)」的独立关卡组成。这些塔由一个公开的社群的创作者们共同建造。由于游戏采用开放式设计，其运作方式类似于关卡编辑器：任何人都可以建造、上传及分享自己的塔。从中，EToH 的开发团队会精选部分塔，于官方游戏中供展出及游玩。  塔中往往会使用来自不同艺术家的多首歌曲，每一至三「层」使用一首独立的歌曲，即每座塔拥有自己的特定播放列表。您的歌曲不会作为游戏的全程背景音乐，而是在塔的特定节点播放一小段时间，与其他曲目共同组成完整的体验。(请参考：https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI) 建造这些塔的社群成员需要取得您的明确授权方可使用您的作品，因此非常期待您的回复！  本人并非开发团队的成员，但在取得您授权或拒绝的证明后，开发团队将会遵从您的意愿。  您将被标注为作曲者，曲目名称会在游戏中播放时显示。您亦可指定哪些歌曲或专辑可供游戏使用（原创作品、混音/非官方混音、唱片公司作品等），以及提出任何其他使用条款。您可在此查看艺术家及其使用条款的列表方式：https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharing (英文)您可随时通过电邮联络开发团队以撤回授权或更新任何条款：(etohofficialcontact@gmail.com)。  本游戏为免费游玩，设有可选的微交易以支持开发者。使用您歌曲的个别塔不会产生收益，但 Roblox 平台设有基于游玩时间的收益机制（Robux），此部分不在游戏开发者的控制范围内。  感谢您拨冗考虑此事。如有任何疑问，敬请提出。另外，您的回复可能会被公开存档以作纪录；如您希望回复保密，烦请告知，内容将仅限于本人与 EToH 开发团队之间。  敬颂艺安， (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Anmodning om tilladelse til brug af musik i et Roblox spil.

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Hej (Artist),  Jeg skriver til dig, da jeg vil høre dine tanker om at bruge dine sange i Roblox spillet "Eternal Towers of Hell", også kendt som "EToH". Spillet har flere forskellige 3D platforms-baner som hedder "tårne", der bliver lavet af forskellige byggere i et fælleskab. Fordi at spillet ikke har strenge rammer, fungerer det meget som et "niveau bygnings-system" som nemlig betyder at alle kan bygge, uploade eller dele deres eget tårn. Ud af disse tårne, vælges kun et par af dem af EToH's udviklere som herefter fremviser dem i udvalgte områder i et privat ejet spil med spotlight på dem.  Tårne bruger ofte flere forskellige sange fra forskellige kunstnere, hvor hver eneste "etage" af tårnet bruger dets eget sang. Måden sangene er brugt i spillet er lignende med at hver tårn har sin egen tilpasset playliste. Dine sange vil ikke kun bruges som baggrundslyd til spillet, men vil i stedet spille på specifikke tidspunkter af et tårn i et lille stykke tid, hvor kombineret med flere forskellige sange skaber en komplet oplevelse. (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  Fælleskabet der bygger disse tårne har brug for eksplicit tilladelse til at bruge dine værk, så dine tanker ville sættes stor pris på!  Jeg er ikke en del af udviklingsholdet bag spillet, men med beviser af din tilladelse eller eventuelt afslag, vil udviklerne imødekomme dine anmodninger.  Du vil blive krediteret som komponisten af sangen, med navnet brugt på display i spillet.Du må også gerne være specifik med hvilke sange, eller albums der er tilladt at bruge i spillet (originalversioner, remix/bootlegs, pladeselskab, osv.) samt at anmode andre vilkår af brug.Du kan se hvordan andre kunstnere giver vilkår af brug for deres sange her: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingDu har muligheden for at tilbagekalde tilladelse, eller at opdatere vilkårene når som helst ved at kontakte deres mail på: (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).  Spillet er gratis at spille med valgfrie mikrotransaktioner som direkte støtter udviklerne. Individuelle tårne hvor dine sange bliver brugt, vil ikke generere indtægter, dog har Roblox spilletidsindtægter (robux) hvilket er ude af spillets kontrol.  Tusind tak for at bruge din tid på at overveje dette. Hvis du har nogle spørgsmål, så bare spørg. Dog skal du vide at dit svar muligvis offentliggøres. Medmindre du ønsker at dit svar holdes privat, skal du skrive det til os, hvor vi så holder det privat mellem mig og resten af udvikleren bag EToH.  Venlig hilsen, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Verzoek om toestemming voor het gebruik van muziek in een Roblox game.

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: [Beste/Geachte] (Artist),  Ik neem contact met u op om uw mening te vragen over het gebruik van uw nummers binnen het Roblox-spel "Eternal Towers of Hell", dat vaak wordt afgekort naar "EToH".  Het spel bestaat uit een collectie "towers"; de 3D-platformerlevels in het spel. Het ontwikkelingsproces van deze towers wordt uitgevoerd door een open community van verschillende ontwikkelaars. Het systeem functioneert als een creatief platform waarbij gebruikers hun eigen towers kunnen bouwen en delen. Een zorgvuldige selectie van deze towers wordt door de hoofdontwikkelaars van EToH uitgekozen voor in het spel.  Dat was een kleine introductie, nu het belangrijkste deel. In deze towers worden diverse nummers gebruikt van verschillende artiesten. Elke "floor" van een tower beschikt over een ander nummer. De manier waarop muziek in het spel wordt gebruikt, is vergelijkbaar met het hebben van een eigen afspeellijst voor elke tower. Uw nummers zullen dus niet gebruikt worden als achtergrondmuziek voor het gehele spel, maar afgespeeld worden op een specifiek punt in een tower voor een beperkte duur. Samen met andere nummers van andere artiesten zorgt dat voor een complete beleving. Hier kunt u voorbeelden bekijken van hoe muziek in het spel wordt geïmplementeerd. (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  De community die deze towers bouwt, heeft expliciete toestemming nodig om uw werk te gebruiken, dus uw gedachten hierover worden zeer gewaardeerd!  Ik ben niet verbonden aan het ontwikkelingsteam, maar met bewijs van uw toestemming of afwijzing zullen de ontwikkelaars uw verzoeken handhaven.  U wordt vermeld als de componist, waarbij de naam van het gebruikte nummer in beeld verschijnt terwijl het in het spel wordt afgespeeld.U kunt aangeven welke specifieke nummers, albums of versies (zoals originelen of remixen) zijn toegestaan en eventuele aanvullende voorwaarden stellen.U kunt via de onderstaande link inzien hoe de licentievoorwaarden van diverse artiesten worden geadministreerd: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingU behoudt het recht om uw toestemming op ieder gewenst moment in te trekken of te wijzigen door contact op te nemen via (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).  De game is gratis te spelen met optionele microtransacties om de ontwikkelaars te ondersteunen. Individuele towers waarin uw nummers worden gebruikt genereren geen inkomsten, maar Roblox heeft inkomsten op basis van speeltijd (robux), wat buiten de controle van het spel valt.  Wij danken u hartelijk voor uw tijd en de overweging van dit verzoek. Mocht u vragen hebben, dan beantwoorden wij deze graag. Houd er rekening mee dat uw antwoord openbaar kan worden gemaakt voor de administratie; mocht u echter wensen dat uw reactie privé blijft, geef dit dan aan en het zal tussen mij en de ontwikkelaars van EToH blijven.  Met vriendelijke groet, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Paghingi ng permiso na gumamit ng musika sa isang larô.

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Magandang [umaga,hapon,gabi,araw] po, (Artist),  Nagmemensahe po ako sa iyong mga saloobin tungkol sa paggamit ng kanta mo sa silid ng Roblox game na tinatawag ng “Eternal Towers of Hell” kilala rin bilang “EToH”. Binubuo ang larong ito ng 3D Platformer na tinatawag ng “towers” o tore, ang pag-unlad nito ay itinayô ng open community na may iba’t ibang tagapagtayô. Dahil open-ended ang larô, katulad ito sa sistem ng tagalikha ng antas o level creator system: kahit sino ay kayang magtayô, mag-upload, at magbahagi sa kanilang tower. Sa mga tower na ito, isang maikling seleksyon ang pipiliin ng mga developer upang ipakita sa loob ng mga custom na lugar ng isang pribadong mag-aaring spotlight game.  Ang mga tower ay kadalasang gumagamit ng maraming kanta mula sa iba’t ibang uri ng mga artista, kung saan ang bawat “floor” ng tower ay gumagamit ng iba’t ibang kanta: ang paraan ng mga kanta sa larô ay katulad sa bawat tower na may sariling custom na kanta. Ang mga kanta mo ay hindi magbubuo sa buong background audio, kundi tutugtog lamang sa mga partikular na lugar ng isang tower sa maikling panahon na kung saan ang pagsasama sa maraming iba pang mga track ay lumilikha ng isang kumpletong experience o karanasan. (Halimbawa: https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  Kailangan ng permiso ang komunidad na nagtatayô ng mga tower na ito, kayá ang mga saloobin mo ay lubos na pinahahalagahan.  Hindi ako kaakibat sa developer team, pero may ebidensya kung pinayagan o hindi pinayagan.  Bibigyan ka ng kredito bilang ang kompositor o composer kasama ang pamagat ng kanta na ginagamit para display habang nagtugtog ito sa larô.Maaari mo ring tiyakin kung aling mga kanta, o album, ay pwedeng magamit sa larô. (mga orihinal, remix/bootleg, mga record label, atbp.) pati na ring humingi ng anumang iba pang tuntunin ng paggamit o terms of use.Makikita mo kung paano nakalista ang mga artista at ang kanilang mga usage terms dito: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingMaaari mong bawiin ang permiso o i-update ang anumang terms of use sa anumang oras sa pamamagitan ng pagmensahe sa kanilang email na (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).  Libre ang paglalarô nito na may opsyonal na mga microtransaction para suportahan ang mga developer. Ang mga indibidwal na tower kung saan gagamitin ang iyong mga kanta ay hindi kumikità, ngunit ang Roblox ay may kità sa oras ng paglalarô o “playtime revenue” (robux) na wala sa kontrol ng mga larô.  Salamat po sa paglalan ng oras upang isaalang-alang ito. Kung may katanungan ka, mangyaring magtanong. Pakitandaan ang iyong tugon ay maaaring pampubliko para sa talaan, ngunit kung nais mong panatilihing pribado ang iyong tugon, mangyaring magtanong at ito’y manatili sa pagitan ko ay ng mga developer ng EToH.  Lubos po akong nagpapasalamat sa inyong oras, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: 🇫🇮 Finnish​
searchDocs.content: Translated by EliazVJL

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Lupa musiikin käyttöön Roblox-pelissä

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Hei (Artist),  Otan yhteyttä kysyäkseni ajatuksiasi kappaleidesi käytöstä Roblox-pelissä "Eternal Towers of Hell", joka tunnetaan myös nimellä "EToH". Peli koostuu monista erilaisista 3D-tasohyppelykentistä, joita kutsutaan "torneiksi". Näitä torneja kehittää avoin yhteisö, joka koostuu monista eri rakentajista. Koska peli on avoin, se toimii samankaltaisesti kuin kenttäeditorijärjestelmä: kuka tahansa voi rakentaa, ladata ja jakaa oman torninsa. Näistä torneista vain pieni osa valitaan EToH-kehittäjien toimesta esiteltäväksi mukautetuilla alueilla yksityisesti ylläpidetyssä spotlight-pelissä.  Torneissa käytetään usein useita kappaleita eri artisteilta, ja tornin jokaisella "kerroksella" käytetään eri kappaletta. Kappaleiden käyttö pelissä on samankaltaista kuin jokaisella tornilla olisi oma soittolistansa. Kappaleesi eivät muodosta pelin koko taustamusiikkia, vaan ne soivat tietyissä kohdissa tornissa lyhyen ajan, ja yhdessä muiden kappaleiden kanssa muodostavat kokonaisen kokemuksen. (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  Torneja rakentava yhteisö tarvitsee nimenomaisen luvan käyttää teoksiasi, joten ajatuksesi olisivat erittäin arvokkaita!  En ole itse osa kehitystiimiä, mutta luvan tai kiellon todistuksen perusteella kehittäjät noudattavat pyyntöjäsi.  Sinut mainitaan säveltäjänä, ja käytetyn kappaleen nimi näytetään pelissä kappaleen soidessa.Voit myös määrittää, mitä kappaleita tai albumeita peli saa käyttää (alkuperäiset versiot, remixit/bootlegit, levy-yhtiöt jne.), sekä pyytää muita käyttöehtoja.Voit tarkastella, miten artistit ja heidän käyttöehtonsa on listattu täällä: (https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharing)Voit peruuttaa luvan tai päivittää ehtoja milloin tahansa ottamalla yhteyttä sähköpostitse osoitteeseen (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).  Peli on ilmaispeli, jossa on valinnaisia mikro-ostoksia kehittäjien tukemiseksi. Yksittäiset tornit, joissa kappaleitasi käytetään, eivät tuota tuloja, mutta Robloxissa on peliaikaan perustuva tulonmuodostusjärjestelmä (robux), joka ei ole pelin hallinnassa.  Kiitos, että käytät aikaasi tämän harkitsemiseen. Jos sinulla on kysyttävää, kysy rohkeasti. Huomaa, että vastauksesi saatetaan tallentaa julkisesti kirjanpitoa varten, mutta jos haluat vastauksesi pysyvän yksityisenä, ilmoita siitä, niin se pysyy minun ja EToH-kehittäjien välillä.  Ystävällisin terveisin, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Demande de permission pour utiliser votre musique dans un jeu Roblox

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Bonjour (Artist),  Je vous contacte afin d'obtenir votre permission pour utiliser vos chansons dans un jeu Roblox nommé « Eternal Towers of Hell », aussi connu sous le nom de « EToH ». Le jeu est composé d'un assortiment de niveaux de platforming 3D qui sont appelés des « tours », celles-ci étant créées par une communauté de créateurs différents. Le jeu est comparable à un éditeur de niveaux: tout le monde peut créer, publier et partager leurs propres tours. De toutes les créations, une petite sélection est choisie par les développeurs de EToH pour être incluse dans des mondes spéciaux d'un jeu privé qui les mettent en valeur.  Les tours utilisent souvent de multiples titres produits par un grand assortiment de divers artistes, chaque « étage » de la tour utilisant un titre différent des autres : la façon dont les titres sont utilisés dans le jeu est comme si chaque tour possède sa propre playlist. Vos titres ne seront pas utilisés pour remplir tout l’audio d’arrière-plan du jeu, mais plutôt pour être joués à des moments précis d’une tour pendant une assez courte durée. Vos titres seront donc combinés avec des titres d’autres artistes pour créer une expérience complète.  Exemples: https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE, https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI  La communauté qui construit ces tours a besoin de permission explicite d'utiliser votre travail, donc votre avis serait très apprécié!  Je ne suis pas affilié avec l'équipe des développeurs, mais avec preuve de votre accord ou rejet, les développeurs vont maintenir vos requêtes.  Vous serez crédité en tant que compositeur, avec le nom du titre utilisé en exposition pendant que cela joue dans le jeu.Vous pouvez aussi spécifier quels chansons ou albums sont autorisés d'être utilisés dans le jeu (originales, remix/bootleg, disques, etc.), ainsi de suggérer d'autres termes d'utilisation en plus.Vous pouvez voir comment les artistes et leurs termes d'usage sont listés ici: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingVous pouvez révoquer votre permission ou la mettre à jour en contactant leur boite courriel: (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).  Le jeu est gratuit, avec des microtransactions optionnelles pour aider les développeurs. Les tours individuels dans lesquels vos chansons seront utilisées ne génèrent pas de revenus, mais des « Robux » (la monnaie de Roblox) payés selon le temps jeu, ce qui est hors du contrôle du jeu.  Merci de prendre le temps de considérer le tout. Si vous avez des questions, s’il vous plaît demandez. Pour mémoire, notez que votre réponse pourrait être publique, mais si vous voulez que votre réponse soit privée, s’il vous plaît, demandez et ce sera entre moi et les développeurs d’EToH.  J'apprécie énormément vos temps (Sender)

searchDocs.title: 🇩🇪 German​
searchDocs.content: Translated by Theeldersoul, littlekkitsune, Tris463

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Die Erlaubnis für die Nutzung ihrer/eurer Musik in einem Roblox Spiel  („Ihrer“ is used if there is a singular standalone artist who made the Song. „Eurer“ is used if the email is directed towards multiple people, a team or a band.)

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Important note: All multiple-choice versions based on gender or group size are enclosed in curly brackets {}. Please select the appropriate phrase and remove the hints, brackets and the other options before sending.  { Sehr geehrte/-r (Artist), [Standard gender-neutral and inclusive option. Use this if the artist's gender is unknown or to be as inclusive as possible. The "-r" ending covers both masculine and feminine forms.]  Sehr geehrter (Artist), [Use this specifically if the artist is known to be male.]  Sehr geehrte (Artist), [Use this specifically if the artist is known to be female.]  Sehr geehrtes Team von (Artist), [Use this if you are contacting a band, a musical collective, or the artist's management team.] }  Ich kontaktiere Sie, um Erlaubnis über die Nutzung Ihrer Songs in dem Roblox Spiel „Eternal Towers of Hell“, auch bekannt als „EToH“, zu bitten. Das Spiel besteht aus einer großen Menge an 3D Platformer-Leveln welche „Towers“ genannt werden und welche von einer offenen Subcommunity der Fanbase, genannt „Builders“, erstellt werden. Dies bedeutet, dass das Spiel eine Art „Level-Creator“ -System um sich erbaut hat: Jeder kann einen „Tower“ bauen, hochladen und in der Community teilen. Eine Handvoll dieser „Tower“ werden dann in unregelmäßigen Abständen von den EToH-Entwicklern ausgewählt und in von ihnen erstellten Arealen „ausgestellt“, was das Spiel, welches sich in Privatbesitz befindet, zu einer Art „Showcase“- oder „Spotlight“ -Spiel macht.  Die „Towers“ benutzen oft mehrere Songs von den verschiedensten Künstlern, jeder „Floor“ oder auch Abschnitt eines „Towers“ nutzt meist einen separaten Song. Die Art und Weise, wie die Songs in jedem „Tower“ benutzt werden, ist so, als würde jeder „Tower“ eine selbsterstellte Playlist abspielen. Ihre Songs werden, falls Sie der Nutzung zustimmen, nicht die gesamte Hintergrundmusik des Spiels ausmachen, sondern nur an bestimmten Punkten in den „Towers“ abgespielt werden, wo sie gemeinsam mit den anderen Songs eine eigenständige Spielerfahrung kreieren, welche das Spielgeschehen unterstützt. Im Folgenden finden Sie zwei Beispiele in Form von Videos, wie Musik in EToH verwendet wird: https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE; https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI.  Die Community, welche diese Türme baut, benötigt Ihr explizites Einverständnis, um Ihre Musik in den Türmen verwenden zu dürfen. Dementsprechend ist Ihr Einverständnis für uns von großer Bedeutung.  Ich selbst stehe mit dem Entwicklerteam nicht direkt in Verbindung. Trotzdem wird Ihre Genehmigung oder Ihr Verbot an jene Entwickler weitergeleitet, welche sich nach Ihren persönlichen Wünschen bezüglich des Umgangs mit Ihrer Musik richten werden.  {  Sie werden als Künstler/-in bzw. Komponist/-in des jeweiligen Audios genannt werden, zusammen mit dem Titel des Audios, welcher im Spiel gezeigt wird, während dieser abgespielt wird. [Standard gender-neutral option. Use this if the artist's gender is unknown or to ensure inclusivity.] Sie werden als Künstler/Komponist des jeweiligen Audios genannt werden, zusammen mit dem Titel des Audios, welcher im Spiel gezeigt wird, während dieser abgespielt wird. [Use this specifically if the artist is known to be male.] Sie werden als Künstlerin/Komponistin des jeweiligen Audios genannt werden, zusammen mit dem Titel des Audios, welcher im Spiel gezeigt wird, während dieser abgespielt wird. [Use this specifically if the artist is known to be female.] Sie werden als die Künstler/Komponisten des jeweiligen Audios genannt werden, zusammen mit dem Titel des Audios, welcher im Spiel gezeigt wird, während dieser abgespielt wird. [Use this if the music was created by a band, duo, or multiple people (plural form).] } Weiterhin steht es Ihnen frei, festzulegen, welche Art der von Ihnen produzierten Lieder/Audios im Rahmen des Spiels benutzt werden dürfen (Originale, Remixes, Bootlegs, Veröffentlichungen über bestimmte Musiklabels etc.), sowie anderweitige spezifische Regeln zur Nutzung Ihrer Musik aufzustellen. Über folgenden Link können Sie einsehen, unter welchen Auflagen/Bedingungen Künstler*innen die Nutzung ihrer Musik freigegeben/verboten haben (Bitte beachten Sie, dass das genannte Dokument in englischer Sprache verfasst wurde): https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharing Selbstverständlich ist es Ihnen jederzeit möglich, Ihre Nutzungsgenehmigung zurückzuziehen oder die entsprechenden Nutzungsbedingungen abzuändern, indem Sie eine entsprechende Anfrage an folgende E-Mail-Adresse senden: etohofficialcontact@gmail.com  Das Spiel selbst ist kostenfrei mit optionalen Mikrotransaktionen, die zur Unterstützung des Entwicklerteams dienen. Einzelne Türme, unter anderem auch die, welche Ihre Musik verwenden würden, generieren keine separaten Einnahmen. Jedoch werden Einnahmen durch aktive Spielzeit automatisch von Roblox in Form von Robux (einer digitalen Spielwährung) generiert. Dies kann nicht von den Entwicklern von EToH beeinflusst werden.  Ich möchte mich schon mal recht herzlich dafür bedanken, dass Sie diese Anfrage in Erwägung ziehen. Sollten Sie Fragen haben, können Sie sich gerne an mich wenden.  Ebenfalls möchte ich Sie darüber informieren, dass Ihre Antwort auf diese Anfrage eventuell der Öffentlichkeit zur Verfügung gestellt wird. Sollten Sie wünschen, dass dies nicht passiert, bitte ich hier um eine kurze Rückmeldung. Ihre Antwort wird dementsprechend nur dem Entwicklerteam weitergeleitet.  Ich bedanke mich recht herzlich für Ihre Zeit und verbleibe  Mit freundlichen Grüßen, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Αίτημα για άδεια χρήσης τραγουδιού σε ένα παιχνίδι στο Roblox.

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Γειά σας (Artist)  Σας γράφω για να ρωτήσω για την γνώμη σας για την χρήση των τραγουδιών σας σε ένα βιντεοπαιχνίδι στην πλατφόρμα Roblox το οποίο λέγεται "Eternal Towers Of Hell" ή αλλιώς "EToH" για συντομία. Το παιχνίδι αποτελείται από μια ποικιλία 3D επιπέδων πλατφόρμας που ονομάζονται "towers", που η δημιουργία των οποίων γίνεται από μια ανοιχτή κοινότητα από πολλούς διαφορετικούς δημιουργούς. Επειδή το παιχνίδι είναι ανοιχτού τύπου, δουλεύει παρόμοια με ένα σύστημα δημιουργίας επιπέδων: οποιοσδήποτε έχει την ικανότητα να δημιουργήσει, ανεβάσει και να μοιραστεί το tower του. Από αυτά τα towers, ελάχιστα επιλέγονται από τούς δημιουργούς του EToH, ώστε να παρουσιαστεί σε ειδικά διαμορφωμένες περιοχές ενός ιδιωτικά διαχειριζόμενου παιχνιδιού προβολής.  Τα Towers συνήθως χρησιμοποιούν διαφορά τραγούδια από μια ποικιλία από πολλούς διαφορετικούς καλλιτέχνες, με κάθε "floor" του tower να χρησιμοποιεί ένα διαφορετικό τραγούδι: ο τρόπος που τα τραγούδια αυτά χρησιμοποιούνται στο παιχνίδι είναι παρόμοιος με το κάθε tower να έχει σαν δικιά του μοναδική playlist. Τα τραγούδια σας δεν θα καταλαμβάνουν ολόκληρη την background music του παιχνιδιού, αλλά θα παίζουν σε συγκεκριμένα σημεία ενός tower για σχετικά μικρή διάρκεια, όπου τα οποία συνδυασμένα με πολλαπλά άλλα κομμάτια φτιάχνουν μια ολόκληρη νέα εμπειρία. Μερικά παραδείγματα είναι οι σύνδεσμοι παρακάτω: (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE , https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  Η κοινότητα που δημιουργεί αυτά τα towers χρειάζεται ειδική άδεια για να χρησιμοποιήσει τα μουσικά έργα σας, οπότε θα εκτιμούσαμε πολύ την γνώμη σας! :)  Εγώ δεν έχω καμία σχέση με την ομάδα των δημιουργών του παιχνιδιού, αλλά με αποδείξεις με την αποδοχή ή άρνησή σας, οι δημιουργοί θα τηρήσουν το θέλημά σας.  Θα αναφέρεστε ως αρχικός συνθέτης, με το όνομα του κομματιού σας που παίζει εκείνη την στιγμή στο παιχνίδι.Μπορείτε επίσης να αναφέρετε ποια συγκεκριμένα τραγούδια, ή άλμπουμ, επιτρέπετε να χρησιμοποιηθούν από το παιχνίδι.(πρωτότυπα, remix/bootleg, δισκογραφικές εταιρείες, κτλ.), όπως επίσης και οποιοδήποτε άλλο θέλημά σάς για τους όρους χρήσης.Εδώ μπορείτε να δείτε πώς εμφανίζονται οι καλλιτέχνες και οι όροι χρήσης τους: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingΜπορείτε επίσης να ζητήσετε αλλαγές για τους όρους χρήσης οποιαδήποτε ώρα επικοινωνώντας με το email τους στο: (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).  Το παιχνίδι είναι δωρεάν με προαιρετικές συναλλαγές για να στηρίξουν τους δημιουργούς. Οι συγκεκριμένοι towers στους οποίους τα τραγούδια σας θα χρησιμοποιηθούν, δεν παράγουν έσοδα, αλλά το Roblox έχει έσοδα (robux) με βάση την διάρκεια παιχνιδιού, κάτι που δεν ελέγχεται από το παιχνίδι.  Σας ευχαριστώ που αφιερώσατε την ώρα να το σκεφτείτε. Άμα έχετε άλλες απορίες, παρακαλώ ρωτήστε. Επίσης να ξέρετε ότι ή απάντηση σας μπορεί να είναι δημόσια για τώρα, όμως άμα θελήσετε να μείνει ιδιωτική, παρακαλώ ρωτήστε και θα μείνει μεταξύ εμένα και τους δημιουργούς του EToH.  Εκτιμώ ιδιαίτερα τον χρόνο σας, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Permohonan izin penggunaan musik dalam game Roblox

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Yth. [artist name, or contact person/representative of artist name, if any]  Dengan hormat,  Melalui surat ini saya memohon izin untuk menggunakan musik yang dibuat oleh [ARTIST NAME] dalam sebuah game Roblox bernama Eternal Towers of Hell (EToH).  Game ini terdiri dari berbagai macam level platformer 3D yang biasa disebut "tower". Dari sekian banyaknya "tower" yang terdapat di dalam game ini, tiap "tower" menggunakan musik sebagai BGM dalam "tower" tersebut. Musik yang digunakan tidak akan diputar selamanya ataupun digunakan sepenuhnya dalam game ini, melainkan akan hanya diputar pada bagian-bagian pendek tertentu yang akan digunakan untuk tower itu saja. (contoh penggunaan: https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE dan https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  Saya tidak berafiliasi dengan tim developer EToH, tetapi semua musik yang digunakan dalam game ini wajib memiliki bukti izin penggunaan dari artis yang bersangkutan sebelum dapat digunakan.  Berikut adalah ketentuan untuk permohonan izin ini:  Nama [ARTIST NAME] akan dicantumkan sebagai artis dari setiap karya yang akan digunakan, seperti yang ada di dalam kedua video di atas.[ARTIST NAME] dapat menentukan karya dan/atau album yang boleh digunakan dalam game ini (karya orisinal, remix/bootleg, label rekaman, dsb.) dan ketentuan spesifik lainnya.Daftar artis yang musiknya telah diizinkan untuk digunakan dalam EToH beserta syarat dan ketentuan masing-masing dapat diakses melalui tautan berikut. https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingPencabutan izin ataupun pengubahan syarat penggunaan dapat dilakukan kapan pun melalui kontak pos-el etohofficialcontact@gmail.com.  Game ini gratis untuk dimainkan, tapi mengandung mikrotransaksi opsional untuk mendukung developer game ini. Karya-karya tersendiri yang digunakan tidak akan menghasilkan pendapatan apa pun, tetapi terdapat sebuah sistem bernama "Creator Rewards" yang diterapkan oleh Roblox secara permanen dan sepenuhnya terlepas dari kendali tim developer EToH untuk memodifikasi ataupun menghentikannya.  Jika [BAPAK/IBU] memiliki pertanyaan, silakan bertanya. Harap diketahui bahwa tanggapan [BAPAK/IBU] mungkin akan dipublikasikan. Namun, apabila [BAPAK/IBU] menginginkan tanggapan [BAPAK/IBU] untuk tetap bersifat privat, silakan sampaikan dan tanggapan tersebut akan tetap menjadi rahasia antara saya dan tim developer EToH.  Demikian surat permohonan izin ini saya sampaikan. Atas perhatian [BAPAK/IBU], saya ucapkan terima kasih.  [SENDER NAME]

searchDocs.title: 🇯🇵 Japanese​
searchDocs.content: Translated by Zetex

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Robloxゲームでの楽曲使用の許可についてのご相談

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: (Artist)様  突然のご連絡失礼いたします。  Robloxゲーム「Eternal Towers of Hell（EToH）」における楽曲の使用につきまして、ご検討いただきたくご連絡いたしました。本ゲームは「タワー」と呼ばれる3Dプラットフォーマーのレベルで構成されており、これらはさまざまなプレイヤーによるオープンコミュニティで開発されています。また、本ゲームはオープンな性質を持っており、誰でも自分自身の「タワー」を制作・アップロード・共有することが可能で、レベル作成システムに類似した仕組みとなっております。その中から一部の「タワー」が選出され、開発チームによって運営される特別なエリア（スポットライト用ゲーム）にて紹介されます。  「タワー」では、さまざまなアーティストの複数の楽曲が使用されることが多く、各「フロア」ごとに別々の楽曲が使用されます。このように、ゲーム内での楽曲の使われ方は、各「タワー」がそれぞれ独自のカスタムプレイリストを持っているのと似ています。楽曲はゲーム全体のBGMのすべてを構成するものではなく、「タワー」内の特定のポイントで短時間再生され、複数の他のBGMと組み合わさることで一つの完成された体験を作り出します。（https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI）  私は開発チームの関係者ではありませんが、楽曲の使用に関する明確なご意思（許可または拒否）をいただければ、開発者はそのご意向を尊重いたします。  楽曲がゲーム内で再生される際には、アーティストとしてクレジットされ、トラック名が表示されます。また、ゲーム内で使用を許可する楽曲やアルバム（オリジナル、リミックス、レコードレーベル等）を指定したり、その他の利用条件を設定していただくことも可能です。アーティストおよびその利用条件の掲載例はこちらからご確認いただけます：https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?gid=0#gid=0 (英語)許可の取り消しや利用条件の変更は、いつでも以下のメールアドレスまでご連絡いただくことで可能です：etohofficialcontact@gmail.com  本ゲームは基本プレイ無料であり、開発者を支援するための任意のマイクロトランザクションが含まれております。楽曲が使用される個別の「タワー」自体から直接的な収益は発生いたしませんが、Robloxにはプレイ時間に基づく収益（Robux）が存在しており、こちらはゲーム側では制御できない仕組みとなっております。  お時間をいただき、誠にありがとうございます。 (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Roblox-та музыканы пайдалануға рұқсат сұраңыз.

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Сәлеметсіз бе (Artist),  Мен сізге «Eternal Towers of Hell» (немесе «EToH») "Roblox" ойынында әндеріңізді пайдалану туралы пікіріңізді білу үшін хабарласып отырмын. Бұл ойын «мұнаралар» деп аталатын түрлі 3D-платформер деңгейлерінен тұрады, оларды әртүрлі құрылысшылардан құралған ашық қоғамдастық жасайды. Ойынның форматы еркін болғандықтан, ол деңгейлерді құрастыру жүйесіне ұқсас жұмыс істейді: кез келген адам өз мұнарасын салып, жүктеп және онымен бөлісе алады. Осы мұнаралардың ішінен EToH әзірлеушілері шағын жинақты таңдап алып, оларды жеке меншіктегі негізгі ойын.  «Мұнаралар» жиі әртүрлі орындаушылардың бірнеше әндерін пайдаланады, мұнда мұнараның әр «қабатында» бөлек ән шырқалады: ойында әндердің қолданылу тәсілі әр мұнараның жеке плейлисті бар екеніне ұқсайды. Сіздің әндеріңіз ойынның бүкіл фондық дыбысын құрамайды, керісінше мұнараның белгілі бір тұстарында қысқа уақыт бойы ойналады. Олар басқа да көптеген тректермен үйлесе отырып, біртұтас әсер (атмосфера) тудырады. (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE ; https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  Бұл мұнараларды тұрғызушы қауымдастыққа сіздің туындыларыңызды пайдалану үшін арнайы рұқсат қажет, сондықтан сіздің пікіріңіз біз үшін өте маңызды!  Мен әзірлеушілер тобына жатпаймын, бірақ сіздің рұқсатыңыздың немесе бас тартуыңыздың дәлелі болса, әзірлеушілер сіздің талаптарыңызды міндетті түрде орындайды  Сіз ойында ойнаған кезде дисплейде қолданылатын трек атымен композитор ретінде есептелесіз. Сондай-ақ, ойында қандай әндерді немесе альбомдарды пайдалануға рұқсат етілгенін (түпнұсқалар, ремикс/бутлег, жазба белгілері, т.б.) көрсетуге, сондай-ақ кез келген басқа пайдалану шарттарын сұрауға болады.  Орындаушылардың тізімімен және олардың туындыларын пайдалану шарттарымен мына жерде таныса аласыз: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingСіз кез келген уақытта рұқсатыңызды қайтарып ала аласыз немесе шарттарды өзгерте аласыз, ол үшін мына электрондық поштаға хабарлассаңыз жеткілікті: (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).  Ойын әзірлеушілерді қолдау үшін қосымша микротранзакциялармен ойнауға тегін. Әндеріңіз пайдаланылатын жеке мұнаралар табыс әкелмейді, бірақ "Roblox"-тың ойын уақытынан түсетін табысы ("Robux") бар, ол ойындардың бақылауында емес.  Осыны қарастыруға уақыт бөлгеніңіз үшін рахмет. Сұрақтарыңыз болса, қойыңыздар. Жауабыңыз жазба үшін жалпыға қолжетімді болуы мүмкін екенін ескеріңіз, бірақ жауабыңыздың құпия болуын қаласаңыз, сұраңыз және ол мен және EToH әзірлеушілері арасында қалады.  Уақытыңызды жоғары бағалаймын, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Roblox 게임에서 음악 사용 허가를 요청드립니다.

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: 안녕하세요, (Artist)님.  Roblox 게임 "Eternal Towers of Hell", 일명 "EToH"에서 귀하의 곡을 사용하는 것에 대한 의견을 여쭙고자 연락드립니다. 이 게임은 여러 건축가들의 오픈 커뮤니티가 함께 제작하는 "타워"라고 불리는 3D 플랫포머 스테이지들로 구성되어 있습니다. 게임이 개방형 구조로 되어 있기 때문에, 레벨 제작 시스템과 비슷하게 누구나 자신의 타워를 만들고, 업로드하고 공유할 수 있습니다. 이 중 일부 타워는 EToH 개발팀에 의해 선정되어, 개인 소유의 "스포트라이트 게임" 안에 마련된 전용 구역에서 소개됩니다.  타워들은 보통 여러 아티스트들의 다양한 곡을 사용하며, 타워의 각 "층"마다 서로 다른 곡이 재생됩니다. 즉, 게임 내에서 음악이 사용되는 방식은 각 타워마다 고유한 커스텀 플레이리스트가 있는 것과 비슷합니다. 귀하의 곡은 게임 전체의 배경음악으로 사용되는 것이 아니라, 타워의 특정 구간에서 짧은 시간 동안 재생되며, 다른 여러 곡들과 함께 어우러져 하나의 완성된 경험을 만들어냅니다. (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  이 타워들을 제작하는 커뮤니티는 귀하의 작품을 사용하기 위해 명시적인 허가가 필요하므로, 귀하의 의견을 들을 수 있다면 감사하겠습니다.  저는 개발팀 소속은 아니지만, 귀하의 동의 또는 거절 의사를 확인하면 개발자들이 귀하의 요청을 반영해 드릴겁니다.  게임 내에서 음악이 재생될때, 귀하는 작곡가로 트레딧이 표시되며 사용된 곡의 제목도 함께 표시됩니다. 특정 곡 또는 특정 앨범만 허용되는지 (오리지널, 리믹스/부틀렉, 음반사 발매본 등) 지정하실 수 있으며, 그 외에도 사용 조건을 추가로 요청하실 수 있습니다. 아티스트와 그 사용 조건이 어떻게 기재되는지는 여기에서 확인하실 수 있습니다: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharing 언제든지 허가를 철회하시거나 사용 조건을 변경하고 싶으시면, 해당 이메일로 연락하시면 됩니다. (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com)  이 게임은 무료로 플레이 할 수 있으며, 개발팀을 지원하기 위한 선택적 인앱 결제 요소가 있습니다. 귀하의 곡이 사용되는 개별 타워는 직접적인 수익을 발생시키지 않지만, Roblox에는 플레이 시간에 따른 수익이 (Robux) 있으며 이는 게임 측에서 통제할 수 없는 부분입니다.  읽어주셔서 감사합니다. 궁금한 점이 있으시면 언제든지 말씀해 주세요. 답변은 기록용으로 공개될 수 있지만, 비공개로 유지되길 원하신다면 요청시 EToH 개발팀과 저 사이에서만 공유됩니다.  시간 내어 검토해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Pieprasījums atļaut izmantot mūziku Roblox spēlē

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Sveiki, (Artist)  Es rakstu, lai uzzināt jūsu domas par jūsu dziesmu izmantošanu Roblox spēlē "Eternal Towers of Hell", ko arī saīsināti sauc "EToH". Spēle sastāv no dažādiem 3D platformas līmeņiem, kurus sauc par "torņiem", un to būvēšanu veic dažādi veidotāji mūsu kopienā. Spēles oficiālie izstrādātāji ir devuši visiem ar pieeju pie Roblox Studio iespēju uzbūvēt, augšupielādēt un kopīgot savu torni. No šiem torņiem, EToH izstrādātāji izvēlas nelielu torņu izlasi, lai tos demonstrētu privāti piederošā EToH zonās.  Torņos bieži tiek izmantotas vairākas dziesmas no dažādiem komponistiem, un katram torņa "stāvam" tiek izmantota atsevišķa dziesma: dziesmu izmantošanas veids spēlē ir tā, kā katram tornim ir savs pielāgots dziesmu saraksts. Jūsu dziesmas neveidotu visu spēles fona skaņu, bet gan tiktu atskaņotas noteiktos torņa punktos nelielu laika posmu, kas apvienojumā ar vairākām citām dziesmām radītu pilnīgu pieredzi. Šeit var redzēt piemērus: https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE; https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI  Kopienai, kas būvē šos torņus, ir nepieciešama atļauja izmantot jūsu dziesmas, tāpēc jūsu domas būtu ļoti novērtētas!  Es neesmu oficiāli [saistīts/saistīta] ar EToH izstrādātāju komandu, bet, ja varētu iegūtu jūsu atļaujas vai atteikuma pierādījumu, izstrādātāji sekotu jūsu vēlējumiem.  Jūs tiksiet [norādīts/norādīta] kā komponists, un spēles laikā tiks parādīts izmantotās dziesmas nosaukums.Jūs varat arī norādīt, kuras dziesmas vai albumus spēle drīkst izmantot (oriģināli, remiksi, ierakstu kompānijas utt.), kā arī pieprasīt jebkādus citus * lietošanas noteikumus.Jūs varat apskatīt, kā mākslinieki un viņu lietošanas noteikumi ir rakstīti šeit: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingJūs varat jebkurā laikā atsaukt atļauju vai atjaunināt jebkurus noteikumus, sazinoties ar oficiālo EToH e-pastu: etohofficialcontact@gmail.com  Spēle ir bezmaksas ar neobligātajiem papildu mikrodarījumiem, lai atbalstītu izstrādātājus. Atsevišķi torņi, kuros tiks izmantotas jūsu dziesmas, nerada ieņēmumus, bet Roblox rada ieņēmumus no pavadītā laika spēlē (caur Roblox paša valūtu - robux), kas nav EToH izstrādātāju kontrolē.  Paldies, ka veltījāt laiku, lai to apsvērtu. Ja jums ir kādi jautājumi, lūdzu, jautājiet. Ņemiet vērā, ka jūsu atbilde var būt publiska, tomēr, ja vēlaties, lai jūsu atbilde tiktu saglabāta privāta, lūdzu, sakiet, un tā paliks starp mani un EToH izstrādātājiem.  Jauku dienu, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Prašymas gauti leidimą naudoti jūsų muziką žaidime "Roblox".

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Laba diena (Artist),  Kreipiuosi į Jus {norėdamas}/[norėdama] sužinoti Jūsų nuomonę apie Jūsų dainų naudojimą "Roblox" žaidime "Eternal Towers of Hell", kitaip vadinamu "EToH". Žaidimą sudaro įvairūs 3D platformerio lygiai, vadinami "towers", kurie yra kuriami atvira skirtingų kūrėjų bendruomenė. Kadangi žaidimas yra atviras, jis veikia panašiai kaip lygių kūrimo sistema: kiekvienas gali statyti, įkelti ir bendrinti savo bokštą. Iš šių bokštų, keli yra išrenkami "EToH" kūrėjų ir yra demonstruojami privačiame žaidime.  Bokštuose dažnai naudojamos kelios skirtingų atlikėjų dainos, o kiekvienam bokšto "aukštui" naudojama atskira daina: žaidime dainos naudojamos taip, lyg kiekvienas bokštas turėtų savo atskirą grojaraštį. Jūsų dainos nesudarys viso žaidimo foninio garso, bet bus grojamos trumpą laiką tiktais tam tikrose bokšto vietose, o tai kartu su kitomis dainomis sukurs pilnavertę patirtį. (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  Šiuos bokštus kuriančiai bendruomenei reikia tikslaus leidimo naudoti Jūsų kurinius, todėl Jūsų mintys būtų labai vertinamos!  Aš nesu {susijęs}/[susijusi] su kūrėjų komanda, tačiau {gavęs}/[gavus] jūsų leidimo arba nesutikimo įrodymą, kūrėjai patenkins jūsų prašymą.  Žaidime, Jūs būsite nurodyti kaip kompozitoriai kartu su naudotos dainos pavadinimu, kai ji bus grojama. Jūs taip pat galite nurodyti kurios dainos ar albumai yra leidžiami naudoti žaidime (originalios dainos, remiksai, įrašų kompanijos ir kt.), taip pat galite paprašyti bet kokių kitų naudojimo sąlygų. Čia galite peržiūrėti, kaip yra išvardyti menininkai bei jų naudojimo sąlygos: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharing Sutikimą galite atšaukti arba bet kada atnaujinti sąlygas, susisiekdami su jais šiuo el. pašto adresu (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).  Šis žaidimas yra nemokamas, su pasirenkamais mokėjimais, kurie yra skirti paremti žaidimo kūrėjus. Individualūs bokštai, kuriuose bus naudojamos jūsų dainos, neuždirbą pajamų, tačiau "Roblox" duoda pajamas už laiką praleistą žaidime ("robux"), kurių žaidimo kūrėjai negali kontroliuoti.  Dėkojame, kad skyrėte laiko tai apsvarstyti. Jei turite klausimų, prašome kreiptis. Atkreipkite dėmesį, kad Jūsų atsakymas gali būti viešas, tačiau jei norite, kad jis būtų privatus, prašome kreiptis ir jis liks tiktais tarp manęs ir "EToH" kūrėjų.  Dėkoju už skirtą laiką, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Prośba o pozwolenie użycia waszej muzyki w grze na platformie Roblox.

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Cześć (Artist), piszę do was w sprawie zastanowienia się nad użyciem waszych utworów w grze Roblox zwanej "Eternal Towers of Hell", także znanej jako EToH.  Gra ta składa się z multum poziomów platformowych 3D, zwanych "Wieżami", nad którymi pracuje wiele twórców z naszej otwartej społeczności. Gdyż gra jest dostępna dla każdego, działa ona podobnie do systemu kreatora poziomów: każdy może budować, publikować oraz udostępnić stworzone wieże. Z tych wież jedynie mała część jest wybierana przez deweloperów EToH, aby pokazać je w niestandardowych obszarach w prywatnie posiadanej przez nich popularnej grze.  Wieże często używają wielu utworów powiązanych z różnymi wykonawcami, z każdym "piętrem" wieży jest używana osobna piosenka; sposób, w jaki piosenki są używane w grze, jest podobny do posiadania unikatowej listy utworów dla każdej z wież. Wasze piosenki nie będą grać cały czas jako muzyka w tle dla gry, natomiast będą grały krótko w konkretnych momentach w wieży, które w połączeniu z wieloma innymi utworami tworzą pełną rozgrywkę. (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  Nasza społeczność, która to wszystko tworzy, potrzebuje waszej wyraźnej zgody, aby dalej móc używać waszej muzyki, więc za przemyślenie tego byłbym bardzo wdzięczny!  Nie jestem powiązany z zespołem deweloperów gry EToH, ale z dowodem waszej zgody bądź odmowy, deweloperzy spełnią waszą prośbę.  Będziecie wymienieni jako artyści, z nazwą waszego utworu podczas gdy będzie grał w tle.Możecie też powiedzieć które utwory lub albumy mogą być używane w trakcie gry (oryginał, remix/bootleg, wydawnictwo muzyczne itp.), a także poprosić o wszelkie inne warunki z ich korzystania.Możecie zobaczyć innych artystów oraz ich warunki na liście znajdującej się poniżej:https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingZawsze możecie odwołać albo zmienić prawa do używania waszych utworów poprzez skontaktowanie się na email (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).  Gra jest dostępna za darmo dla wszystkich z opcjonalnymi mikrotransakcjami, aby wesprzeć deweloperów EToH. Indywidualne wieże, w których będą grały wasze piosenki, nie generują przychodów, ale Roblox posiada system płacący za czas graczy spędzony w grze, który jest poza kontrolą deweloperów.  Dziękuję za poświęcony czas na rozważenie tej kwestii. Jeżeli macie jakiekolwiek pytania, proszę zapytajcie. Miejcie na uwadze, że wasza odpowiedź może być upubliczniona w dokumentach, ale jeżeli sobie tego nie życzycie, możecie o to poprosić i wtedy zostanie to pomiędzy mną i deweloperami EToH.  Bardzo dziękuję za poświęcony czas, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: 🇵🇹 Portuguese​
searchDocs.content: Translated by Tiga3000 and wmpz

searchDocs.title: European Portuguese​
searchDocs.content: Subject​  Pedido de autorização para usar as suas músicas num jogo de Roblox  Body​  Bom dia (morning)/Boa tarde(afternoon)/Boa noite (night), (Artist),  Estou a entrar em contacto para pedir a sua opinião sobre a utilização das suas músicas no jogo da plataforma Roblox "Eternal Towers of Hell", também conhecido por "EToH". O jogo consiste numa variedade de níveis de plataformas 3D chamados "torres", as quais são criadas por uma comunidade aberta de construtores. Como o jogo é aberto, funciona de forma semelhante a um sistema de criação de níveis: qualquer pessoa pode construir, enviar e partilhar a sua própria torre. Destas torres, uma pequena seleção é escolhida pelos criadores do EToH para ser exibida em áreas personalizadas de um jogo exclusivo de destaque.  As torres utilizam normalmente várias músicas de diferentes artistas, onde cada "andar" da torre apresenta uma música diferente: a forma como as músicas são utilizadas no jogo é semelhante à de cada torre ter a sua própria playlist personalizada. As suas obras não irão compor todo o áudio de fundo do jogo, mas serão apenas reproduzidas em pontos específicos de uma torre durante um curto período de tempo, criando uma experiência completa combinadas com outras faixas. (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  A comunidade que constrói estas torres precisa de uma permissão explícita para utilizar o seu trabalho, por isso a sua resposta seria muito apreciada!  Não faço parte da equipa de desenvolvedores, mas com provas da sua autorização ou recusa, eles respeitarão os seus pedidos.  Será reconhecido como o compositor das músicas utilizadas, com o nome da sua obra exibida enquanto tocar numa torre.Também pode especificar que músicas ou álbuns permite que se utilizem no jogo (originais, remixes/"bootlegs", editoras discográficas, etc.), bem como sugerir outros termos de utilização.Pode ver como outros artistas e os seus termos de utilização estão listados aqui: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingPoderá anular quaisquer permissões, ou atualizar os seus termos de utilização a qualquer momento, contactando o email: (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).  O jogo é grátis, com microtransações opcionais para suportar os criadores. Torres individuais onde as suas músicas serão utilizadas não geram rendimento aos desenvolvedores, mas a Roblox possui um sistema de rendimento baseado em tempo de jogo (robux), que está fora do controlo do jogo.  Agradeço o tempo dedicado a este pedido. Se tiver quaisquer perguntas, não hesite em colocá-las. Peço também que tenha em mente que a sua resposta poderá ser pública para registo, mas se desejar que se mantenha privada, basta indicá-lo e ficará entre mim e os criadores de EToH.  Tenha um bom dia, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Cerere de permisiune pentru utilizarea muzicii într-un joc de pe platforma Roblox

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Bună, (Artist),  Îți scriu pentru a cere permisiunea de a folosi melodiile tale în jocul de pe platforma Roblox numit „Eternal Towers of Hell”, cunoscut și ca „EToH”. Jocul constă într-un ansamblu de niveluri 3D de tip platformer, numite „towers”, a căror dezvoltare este realizată de o comunitate deschisă de diferiți creatori. Pentru că jocul este deschis și fără un final prestabilit, funcționează similar unui sistem de creare a nivelurilor: oricine poate construi, încărca și distribui propriul tower. Dintre aceste tower-uri, o mică parte este aleasă apoi de dezvoltatorii EToH pentru a fi prezentată în zone personalizate ale unui joc de tip spotlight, deținut privat.  Tower-urile folosesc deseori mai multe melodii de la diferiți artiști, fiecare „floor” al tower-ului utilizând o melodie separată: modul în care sunt folosite melodiile în joc este similar cu faptul că fiecare tower are propriul playlist personalizat. Melodiile tale nu vor constitui întregul fundal sonor al jocului, ci vor fi redate în anumite momente ale unui tower pentru o durată scurtă de timp, care, combinate cu alte melodii, creează o experiență completă.. (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  Comunitatea care construiește aceste tower-uri are nevoie de permisiune explicită, deci părerea ta va fi apreciată enorm!  Nu sunt afiliat cu echipa de dezvoltare a jocului, dar, cu dovada permisiunii sau a refuzului tău, dezvoltatorii jocului vor respecta solicitările tale.  Vei fi creditat(ă) ca și compozitor, cu numele piesei folosite fiind afișat pe ecran în timp ce aceasta rulează în joc.De asemenea, poți specifica ce melodii sau albume sunt permise să fie folosite în joc (originale, remix/bootleg, case de discuri etc.), precum și să solicitați orice alte condiții de utilizare.Poți vedea modul în care artiștii și termenii lor de utilizare sunt listați aici: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingPoți revoca permisiunea sau actualiza orice termeni în orice moment, contactând echipa prin email la (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).”  Jocul este gratuit, cu microtranzacții opționale pentru a sprijini dezvoltatorii. Tower-urile individuale în care vor fi folosite melodiile tale nu generează venituri, dar Roblox are venituri bazate pe timpul de joc (robux), care sunt în afara controlului jocului.  Îți mulțumesc că ai acordat timp să analizezi această cerere. Dacă ai orice întrebare, te rog să le adresezi. Reține că răspunsul tău poate fi public, pentru evidență; totuși, dacă dorești ca răspunsul să rămână privat, te rog să ne informezi, iar el va rămâne doar între mine și dezvoltatorii EToH.  Apreciez enorm timpul acordat, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Право на использование вашей музыке в игре Roblox

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Здравствуйте, (Artist), я связываюсь с вами чтобы узнать ваше мнение об использовании ваших композиций в Roblox игре “Eternal Towers of Hell’, также известная как “EToH”. Игра состоит из ассортимента уровней 3D платформера под названием “Башни”, разработкой которых занимается открытое сообщество разных строителей. Так как эта игра не имеет конца, она работает похоже на открытую систему строительства уровней, любой может строить, публиковать и делиться своей башней. Из этих башен, отбирается небольшое количество разработчиками EToH чтобы публиковать их в локациях приватно владеемой игры.  Башни часто используют несколько композиций из ассортимента разных композиторов где каждый “ этаж” башни использует отдельную композицию, то как композиции используются в игре аналогичен тому если бы у каждой башни был собственный плейлист. Ваши композиции не будут звучать на фоне всей игры, но вместо этого будут в определенном месте башни на короткий промежуток времени, что в комбинации с другими композициями создает полноценный опыт. (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfE https://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  Сообществу которое занимается строительством этих башен нужно прямое разрешение чтобы использовать ваши работы, так что ваши мысли по этому поводу будут очень важны!  Я не связан с командой разработчиков, но с доказательствами вашего разрешения или отказа, разработчики учтут ваши пожелания.  Вы будете указаны как композитор с названием вашей композиции видимым во время звучания в игреВы можете указать какие именно композиции или альбомы разрешено использовать (оригинальная музыка, каверы, лейблы и т.д.) а также предложить любые другие условия использования.Здесь вы можете просмотреть информацию о композиторах и их условий использования: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingВы можете отозвать права или обновить любые условия использования в любое время написав на электронную почту (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com)  Эта игра бесплатная с дополнительными микро-транзакциями для поддержки разработчиков, отдельные башни где будут использоваться ваши композиции не приносят дохода но Roblox приносит доход за время игры (robux) что вне контроля игры.  Спасибо за то что уделили время чтобы это рассмотреть, если у вас есть вопросы, пожалуйста задавайте. Имейте в виду что ваш ответ может быть опубликован для ясности, но если вы желаете оставить ваш ответ приватным, пожалуйста сообщите и он останется между мной и командой разработчиков EToH.  С уважением, (Sender)

searchDocs.title: 🇪🇸 Spanish​
searchDocs.content: Translated by n64briel, something.sh, Tai_muri, JCguero2012

searchDocs.title: Subject​
searchDocs.content: Solicitud por permiso para usar música en un juego de Roblox.

searchDocs.title: Body​
searchDocs.content: Hola (Artist)  Te estoy contactando para preguntarte sobre tu opinión con el uso de tu música dentro del juego de Roblox, “Eternal Towers of Hell”, también conocido como “EToH”. Este juego consiste de una variedad de niveles 3d llamadas “Torres”, la creación de estas siendo realizada por una comunidad de creadores distintos. Como el juego no tiene límites fijos, es semejante a una sistema de creador de niveles: cualquiera tiene la posibilidad construir, subir, y compartir su propia torre. De estas torres, una selección pequeña es después elegida por los desarrolladores de EToH para exhibirlas dentro de áreas para destacar.  Estas torres usualmente usan una variedad de música hechos por artistas diferentes, con cada “piso” de una torre usando una canción diferente: la forma de que las canciones son usadas es similar a que las torres usen su propia “playlist”. Tus canciones no constituirán la totalidad del audio de fondo del juego, pero se van a reproducir por una cantidad de tiempo breve, la cual con otras canciones se hace de una experiencia completa. (https://youtu.be/zCEJkmVJDfEhttps://youtu.be/lZfSUqDhBKI)  ¡La comunidad que crea estas torres necesitan permiso explícito para usar tus canciones, asi que tu opinión se agradece un montón!  No estoy afiliado con el equipo de desarrollo, pero con evidencia de tu permiso o negación, los desarrolladores pueden llevar a cabo tu solicitud.  Vas a recibir crédito como el artista de la canción, con el nombre de la canción siendo presentada mientras se oye dentro del juego.También puedes especificar cuales canciones o álbumes, son permitidos para que se puedan usar en el juego (originales, remixes/bootlegs, sellos discográficos, etc.), así como solicitar cualquier otro término de uso.Puedes revisar como se listan las artistas y sus términos aquí: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tXtXoZtSqnov08G_gp5T72wplvI-iEkA0muLyNDCI8g/edit?usp=sharingPuedes revocar o actualizar cualquier término o permiso cuando quieras, contactando directamente por su correo electrónico (etohofficialcontact@gmail.com).  El juego es completamente gratis para jugar con compras virtuales opcionales para soportar a los desarrolladores. Torres individuales en donde tus canciones van a ser usadas no generan ganancias, pero Roblox tiene ganancias por tiempo de juego (robux) lo cual está fuera de control del juego actual.  Gracias por tomarte el tiempo para considerar esto. Si tienes cualquier pregunta, por favor hazla. Considera que tu respuesta será pública por el récord, pero si deseas que tu respuesta sea privada, por favor dímelo y quedará solamente entre yo y los desarrolladores de EToH.  Se agradece mucho tu tiempo. (Sender)
